productDisplayName: Scullers Men White & Navy Blue Check Shirt
description: Style Notescullers is a celebration of life at its fullest, most unusual and least expected. Scullers is for those who take life on with self-assurance and soul. A white shirt, checkered with blue and green made from combed cotton is just asking you to style it with shorts or jeans with those shades and flip flops by the pool and beat the heat.Product DescriptionWhite shirt with blue and green checks, spread collar, full front buttoned placket, short sleeves, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% CottonDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or low dry in shadeLow iron inside outSizeRelaxed FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size 40
